comment: Per-chunk gzip-size ceilings in bytes. CI runs scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs after `vite build` and fails the build if any chunk exceeds its budget by >10% (the slop in `slopPercent`). Budgets are sized 5% above the current measured chunks so non-trivial growth is what triggers the alert, not noise from a dependency point-update. Update the numbers here when a deliberate feature lands that grows a chunk — the diff in this file is what reviewers see. Last re-pinned Session 115 after the Tier-3 #14 MarkdownPreview lazy-load: index dropped 118 KB → 87 KB gzip with DOMPurify + micromark now lazy-loaded on first preview-mode toggle. New ceilings: flow 110 KB (unchanged); index 92 KB (was 124, dropped 32 KB from #14); icons 10.5 KB (unchanged).
